content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Found one issue: the change set is metadata-only and does not implement the requested core run lifecycle robustness behaviors. Only review bookkeeping artifacts changed.

## Amendments

1. Patch does not include any runtime implementation for the requested lifecycle hardening. `git diff` shows changes only in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` (`lines 15-37`, `52-72`) and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` (`lines 186-189`) and adds no edits to `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, or `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`. Therefore required behaviors for `run.pid` tracking, `run stop`, stale `run status` reporting, stale-run recovery in `run resume`, and signal-based interruption cleanup are not delivered by this change set.
   Rationale: Critical correctness gap: this amendment set does not implement the features that are the stated acceptance criteria for bead `ralph-burning-rlm`.
